text: It's it's easy to speculate on the decade time horizon. Getting the 3 to 5 year right is going to affect what happens afterwards. You know, sort of labor markets are going to be affected before cost of services comes down.

title: Microsoft AI CEO: "Social Unrest" is Coming | MOONSHOTS
